# Cross-Functional Coordination: Managing Interfaces Between Equipment, HVAC, and Building Systems

## 适用受众
Project_Manager

## 写作角度说明
生物安全设备从来不是独立运行的，它与 HVAC、建筑结构、其他设备存在大量接口。本角度帮助项目经理解析接口管理要点，确保多系统协调顺畅。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Project success at the interfaces—where HVAC meets equipment meets building structure—separates experienced project managers from those who learn coordination complexity through costly mistakes.

## 参考素材
- HVAC interface requirements: pressure cascade maintenance, airflow balance coordination, humidity control
- Building management system integration: BMS connectivity requirements, communication protocols, alarm routing
- Structural coordination: wall opening dimensions, mounting substrate preparation, seismic considerations
- Electrical coordination: power supply capacity, emergency power integration, lighting interface
- Fire safety coordination: fire alarm integration, emergency unlock requirements, smoke detection
- Coordination meeting cadence: weekly multidisciplinary coordination, issue escalation process

## 关键词
Cross-Functional Coordination, HVAC Integration, BMS Interface, Building Systems, Multidisciplinary Coordination, Interface Management
